figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of the proposed pipeline, illustrating preprocessing (tissue detection, quality control, tiling), inference with a frozen foundation-model encoder and MIL aggregation, and post-processing to obtain the final NHI grade.

Fig. 2. Confusion matrices for five-grade NHI prediction: IKEM, TUH, and KNL (top row), whole final test set across all centers (Overall), and PathAI reference results. The colorbar indicates normalized frequencies.
Fig. 3. Qualitative interpretability for a representative region: attention-weight overlay (left) and instance-first classification overlay (right). Overlays visualized in xOpat [32].
